summary.neutral_abstract: Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week. We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic
summary.historical_value: Contemporary Intergalactic Herald publication preserved with role and attribution boundaries.
summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
We are creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
If you would like to support our efforts, donations can be sent to intergalacticherald.sol
Star Atlas Sage Labs HOT TIPS!
Beyond the Horizon posted a video with some tips on playing SAGE Labs.
Metaverse Nomads #116 Star Atlas w/ @Santiacc_
Metaverse Nomads posted a replay of their weekly Star Atlas livestream.
WEEKLY STAR ATLAS NEWSLETTER #101
Aephia posted their weekly Star Atlas Newsletter.
14 | My ULTIMATE Plan for Star Atlas!!!
Pathfinder posted a video about his thoughts on Star Atlas.
Star Atlas Recap Oct 17 2023
Beyond the Horizon posted a video recapping recent Star Atlas news.
STAR ATLAS #202 Updates on THE GAME!
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video of Star Atlas updates.
Navigating Star Atlas #1 – The Vision with CPO Danny Floyd
Star Atlas posted a video interview with the Star Atlas CPO Danny Floyd.
The Atlas Brew #84
Star Atlas TV posted a video replay of the latest Atlas Brew.
Star Atlas Brew #84: Michael Wagner – TLDR
TLDR posted a recap of the latest Atlas Brew.
How to Stay Updated on Star Atlas
Atlas Theory posted a video about how to stay updated on Star Atlas.
STAR ATLAS #203 New Patch With New Ship that SCANS FOR FREE!
MetaVerse Explorer posted another video of Star Atlas updates.
